name: 3q29_microdeletion_DLG1
description: 3q29 recurrent ~1.6 Mb microdeletion / microduplication mediated by flanking direct-orientation SD blocks at 3q29 (LCR3q29A, LCR3q29B) of ~16-20 kb at >97% identity. Highly penetrant for schizophrenia (40x risk), intellectual disability, and autism. The reciprocal duplication is milder but associated with ID and microcephaly.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD blocks of ~15-20 kb at >97% identity (TFRC/PAK2 paralog cassettes); unique core contains 21-22 RefSeq genes including DLG1, BDH1, PAK2, PIGZ, MFI2, FBXO45, NCBP2.
